com.mentor.chs.plugin.library

Interface IXLibraryObjectsExport

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXLibraryExport, IXPlugin

    public interface IXLibraryObjectsExport
extends IXLibraryExport
    If you need to implement a custom export file processing then you need to implement this interface Implementation of this interface is needed if we want to support export of library parts in a format not supported within Library. Implementation of this interface should be able to export library data in custom format from a set of xObjects containing library parts and codes

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void exportLibraryObjects(java.util.Set<IXObject> objects, java.io.File file, IXLibraryImportExportErrorReporter conversionErrorReporter, IXLibraryExportOptions exportOptions)
      This API is automatically called by Library Export where custom export plugin needs to export the parts into some other format not supported within Library.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.library.IXLibraryExport

        getLibraryExportFileExtensionDescription, getLibraryExportFileExtensions

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion

    • Method Detail

      • exportLibraryObjects

        void exportLibraryObjects(java.util.Set<IXObject> objects,
                          java.io.File file,
                          IXLibraryImportExportErrorReporter conversionErrorReporter,
                          IXLibraryExportOptions exportOptions)
        This API is automatically called by Library Export where custom export plugin needs to export the parts into some other format not supported within Library. In case of error during export process we can call error on conversionErrorReporter and stop Library Export process. Also we can log messages during export using conversionErrorReporter exportOptions contains the options selected by user during export say should we export all revisions of component etc. input to this API is the list of IXObject (Library Parts, Codes) selected by user in export window. file parameter is the export file selected by user where he wants to export the parts
        Parameters:
        objects - Set<IXObject> this is the list of IXObject (Library Parts, Codes) selected by user in export window
        file - File this is the export file selected by user where he wants to export the parts
        conversionErrorReporter - IXLibraryImportExportErrorReporter user can call error to stop export process or log to log messages during export process
        exportOptions - IXLibraryExportOptions indicates if user has opted to export all revisions of the part and its housing scope
